description: Structured Standard Operating Procedures for ad optimization across Meta and Google platforms

shared_sops.name: Critical CPL Deviation (Account Level)
shared_sops.recommendation: Immediate pause of bottom 20% underperforming entities required to stabilize budget.
shared_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Account-level CPL monitoring

shared_sops.name: Budget Drain (Zero Leads)
shared_sops.impactTemplate: Campaign "{name}" has spent ₹{spend} with no results.
shared_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Daily Optimizations - conversion tracking sanity

shared_sops.name: CPL Above Target Threshold
shared_sops.recommendation: Review audience targeting, creative quality, or landing page experience.
shared_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Cost stack triage

shared_sops.name: Conversion Rate Floor Breach
shared_sops.impactTemplate: CVR ({cvr}%) is below acceptable floor ({benchmark}%) for {platform}.
shared_sops.recommendation: Audit landing page experience and lead form friction. Simplify form or reduce fields.
shared_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Cost stack triage - CTR/CVR diagnostics

shared_sops.name: Algorithm Learning Trap
shared_sops.impactTemplate: "{name}" has been active {days_active} days with only {leads} leads from {impressions} impressions.
shared_sops.recommendation: Algorithm is stuck learning; reset campaign with broader targeting or switch to 'Clicks' optimization focus temporarily to build signal.
shared_sops.notes: FIX #7: spend > target_cpl * 2 (was target_cpl — wrong units). guards: daysActive > 7, leads < 5, imps > 5000

shared_sops.name: Tracking Anomaly (CVR Drop)
shared_sops.impactTemplate: CVR dropped to {cvr}% (< 50% of 7-day average {baseline}%), indicating possible tracking issue.
shared_sops.recommendation: Check LP/TP tracking, conversion tag firing, form validation issues, or GA4/Ads sync problems. Verify gclid/fbp/wbraid capture and webhook latency.
shared_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Daily Optimizations - conversions & CVR outliers; guard: CVR < 50% of trailing 7-day avg

shared_sops.name: Top Performer Scaling Opportunity
shared_sops.impactTemplate: Consistent leads at ₹{cpl} CPL (30% below target)—volume opportunity available.
shared_sops.recommendationTemplate: Scale budget for "{name}" by 20-25% to capture more volume while maintaining efficiency.
shared_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Winner Scaling playbook; identifies high-efficiency campaigns for budget allocation

shared_sops.name: Account Health Pulse Check
shared_sops.impactTemplate: Health check failed: spend variance {spend_variance}%, {disapprovals} disapprovals, {leads_today} leads today.
shared_sops.recommendation: Review daily health metrics: spend vs plan (±20%), disapprovals/limits, conversion tracking sanity. Fix high-priority issues immediately.
shared_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Daily Optimizations - health & pacing checks

shared_sops.name: Audience Quality Issue
shared_sops.impactTemplate: CPL stable but lead quality (Hot+Warm ratio: {quality_ratio}) indicates audience mismatch.
shared_sops.recommendation: Add tighter lead form filters (budget band, location, timeline). Update audience targeting or exclude low-intent segments. Review form questions for clearer qualification.
shared_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Weekly Optimizations - quality buckets; identifies mismatch between cost and quality

shared_sops.name: Critical Creative Failure
shared_sops.impactTemplate: Ad has critical performance score ({creative_score}), indicating immediate pause needed.
shared_sops.recommendation: Pause ad immediately to recapture budget. Review creative elements (visual, copy, hook) and test new creative variant.
shared_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Creative & Video Creation - diagnostics based on performance score thresholds

shared_sops.name: Advanced Creative Fatigue
shared_sops.impactTemplate: Creative is {creative_age_days} days old with decaying CTR signals.
shared_sops.recommendation: Queue creative refresh with fresh visual angle or new headline hook. Test new creative variant in parallel.
shared_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Creative refresh playbook - 14-21 day refresh window recommended; fatigue signals: rising freq with falling CTR

shared_sops.name: Account CTR Critically Low
shared_sops.impactTemplate: Account CTR ({overall_ctr}%) is below the 0.7% minimum threshold — creatives are failing to stop the scroll.
shared_sops.recommendation: Audit all active ads for creative age (>21 days = fatigue risk). Pause scroll-ignored ads (CTR <0.4%). Test Reels-first format with disruptive first-frame hooks. Segment retargeting audiences from cold audiences to improve relevance.
shared_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Meta ads — CTR <0.7% triggers creative fatigue review. Reels format benchmarks 2-3x CTR vs static in 2026.

shared_sops.name: Extreme CPL Deviation (>2x Target)
shared_sops.impactTemplate: Campaign "{name}" CPL (₹{cpl}) is {ratio}x target — cost stack breakdown required.
shared_sops.recommendation: Run cost-stack triage: (1) Check CPM — if >₹150 = audience/creative issue; (2) Check CTR — if <0.5% = hook failing; (3) Check CVR — if <3% = landing page friction. Fix at the broken layer, not by blanket pausing.
shared_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: CPL >2x requires cost-stack diagnosis across CPM → CTR → CVR before any action.

shared_sops.name: Budget Reallocation to Winner
shared_sops.impactTemplate: {winner_count} winner(s) running alongside {loser_count} underperformer(s) — budget is split inefficiently.
shared_sops.recommendation: Shift 25% of underperformer budget to the top winner. Scale winner by max 25% at a time (avoids learning phase reset). Cap underperformer budget rather than pausing (maintains data signal). Monitor frequency post-scale — if >2.5, creative rotation required.
shared_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Winner scaling playbook — gradual 20-25% budget shifts prevent Meta algorithm disruption.

shared_sops.name: Landing Page / Form Friction (CVR Drop)
shared_sops.issue: Funnel Drop — Landing Page or Form Friction
shared_sops.impactTemplate: Campaign "{name}" has acceptable CTR ({ctr}%) but low CVR ({cvr}%) — clicks are not converting to leads.
shared_sops.recommendation: The creative is working (CTR ok) but the funnel is broken after the click. Actions: (1) Switch from website landing page to Meta Lead Form to reduce friction; (2) If keeping LP — check page speed (<3s), mobile UX, form field count (max 4 fields); (3) Add price anchor + location to the form headline for higher intent qualification.
shared_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: High CTR + Low CVR = post-click funnel failure, not creative failure. Lead form typically 2-3x better CVR than LP for real estate.

meta_sops.name: CPC Inflation (Meta)
meta_sops.impactTemplate: CPC (₹{cpc}) exceeds Meta benchmark (₹45) and is pushing CPL above target.
meta_sops.recommendation: Review bidding strategy, audience overlap, or creative quality. Check for audience duplication between ad sets that increases auction friction.
meta_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Meta Ads - Daily Optimizations; audience/creative is king

meta_sops.name: Creative Fatigue Detected
meta_sops.impactTemplate: Rising CPM (↑), falling CTR (↓), frequency {frequency} indicates audience fatigue with current creative.
meta_sops.recommendation: Queue 2-3 new creative variants immediately. Reuse winning motifs (price on image, testimonials, problem-agitate, benefits). Do NOT pause—refresh and iterate.
meta_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Meta Ads - Bi-weekly Optimizations; fatigue signs: freq >2.5 TOFU/MOFU, >4 BOFU with rising CPM + falling CTR

meta_sops.name: CPM Baseline Deviation
meta_sops.impactTemplate: CPM (₹{cpm}) is +50% above platform baseline (₹{baseline}) with worsening CTR/CPL.
meta_sops.recommendation: Queue creative refresh or audience trim for weekly. Check for audience overlap between ad sets. Reduce frequency or narrow targeting.
meta_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Meta Ads - Demand Gen quick look; baseline CPM ~₹120

meta_sops.name: Creative Rotation Overdue
meta_sops.impactTemplate: Ad set "{name}" frequency is {frequency}x with CTR {ctr}% — audience has seen these ads too many times.
meta_sops.recommendation: Implement 7-day creative rotation: (1) Introduce 2 new ad variants with fresh hooks (disruptive question or price anchor); (2) Pause lowest-CTR ad; (3) Test Reels format if currently running only static. Do NOT expand audience — rotate creative first.
meta_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Frequency >2.0 with CTR decline = rotation signal, not audience expansion signal.

meta_sops.name: Account-Level Frequency Cap Breach
meta_sops.impactTemplate: Account frequency ({overall_frequency}x) exceeds 2.5 — audience fatigue is inflating CPMs and killing CTR.
meta_sops.recommendation: Segmented audience reset: (1) Create a retargeting ad set targeting video viewers (50%+) and website visitors from last 30d with the same winning creative — these convert at 3-5x better CPL; (2) Rest the cold broad audience for 7 days; (3) When restarting cold, use a fresh creative angle (not the same ad). Do NOT increase budget into a fatigued audience.
meta_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Frequency >2.5 TOFU/MOFU = audience fatigue; solution is audience segmentation and creative rotation, not budget pause.

google_sops.name: CPC Inflation (Google Search)
google_sops.impactTemplate: CPC (₹{cpc}) exceeds Google benchmark (₹120) and is pushing CPL above target.
google_sops.recommendation: Review keyword match types, add negatives to shared negative list, or improve Quality Score to reduce CPCs. Focus on Exact/Phrase match keywords only.
google_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Google Ads - Daily Optimizations; CPC control is critical for Search ROI

google_sops.name: Budget-Constrained Delivery
google_sops.impactTemplate: Losing {lost_budget}% of potential traffic due to daily budget caps.
google_sops.recommendationTemplate: Increase daily budget for "{name}" by 20% to capture efficient volume.
google_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Google Ads - Weekly Optimizations; IS Lost (Budget) handling

google_sops.name: Rank-Constrained Delivery
google_sops.impactTemplate: Losing {lost_rank}% of auction share due to low Ad Rank/Quality Score.
google_sops.recommendation: Improve Ad Copy relevance, increase Quality Score, or adjust bids. Focus on top-performing keywords and ad variations.
google_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Google Ads - Weekly Optimizations; IS Lost (Rank) handling

google_sops.name: Low Quality Score Drain
google_sops.impactTemplate: Quality Score {quality_score} is below 6, inflating CPCs and reducing visibility.
google_sops.recommendation: Audit landing page relevance, improve ad copy alignment with keywords, and enhance expected CTR. Focus on keyword-to-ad-to-LP message match.
google_sops.notes: From SOP Dump: Google Ads - Quality Score is the primary lever for reducing CPCs in Search
